author: Video Games Chronicle
text: A pop-up Valorant themed pub run by UK YouTuber Big John opens in London this weekend The takeaway reviewer, known for his "BOSH" catchphrase, is 'running' the Phoenix Arms

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: A project is underway to remaster all 223 issues of ’90s UK publication Sonic the Comic Sonic the Comic Remastered aims to add a new issue every weekday

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Grand Theft Auto 6 cover art revealed as Rockstar locks in November release date Pre-orders for the game start next week, Rockstar says

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Final Fantasy 7 Revelation director says he’s finished it 40 times, and cried every time at one point Naoki Hamaguchi says the scene is "essential" to the story

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: MSI prices its latest handheld at $1,800 as exec says ‘it will be a tough year for us and the gamers’ There's still potential for more price hikes, its marketing lead warns

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Tokyo’s Shibuya region is giving residents Final Fantasy 14 in-game items for donating their taxes The gifts are for those who choose to pay their hometown tax to Shibuya

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Jirachi is coming to Pokémon Pokopia next week for a limited time This is the first event that wasn't included in the game at launch
